findings.description: The dispatch table in s5 lists `doEnd` as the method name for エンドレコード, but `doEnd` is absent from s5's hints and from all other sections' hints. Since no section covers end-record processing explicitly, a user asking about end record handling would not be routed to s5.
findings.source_evidence: Source table: 'エンドレコード | end | doEnd'. The method doEnd appears only in this dispatch table and is not mentioned again in the source.
